title: data-jp client error envelope
description: Error shape returned by `pack.py:_run_client(...)` when a sibling client script fails (subprocess error, non-JSON stdout, non-zero exit, or timeout). Embedded inline at the position where the successful client payload would normally appear (e.g. `info`, `price_history`, `timely_disclosures`, `fundamentals.annual`, `groups.rates.call_rate_on`). Layer 2/3 consumers MUST defensively handle this shape — presence of `error` (non-null) means the block is unusable.

error.description: Human-readable error description. Examples: 'uv not on PATH', 'client returned non-JSON: ...', 'exit 1; stderr=...', 'client timeout after 300s', 'ticker missing from batch response'.

_cmd.description: Optional. Argv array of the failed subprocess for debugging.

_stdout_head.description: Optional. First 500 chars of stdout, present only on JSONDecodeError.

_stderr.description: Optional. Last 500 chars of stderr, present only on subprocess failure.
